info.title: Daily Stock Analysis API
info.description:
A股/港股/美股自选股智能分析系统 API

## 功能模块
- 股票分析：触发 AI 智能分析
- 历史记录：查询历史分析报告
- 股票数据：获取行情数据

## 认证方式
支持可选管理员认证：ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true 时，除登录、状态、健康检查和 OpenAPI 文档外，/api/v1/* 需要有效管理员会话 Cookie；关闭时不强制认证。

get.description: Returns whether auth is enabled and if the current request is logged in.

post.description: Enable or disable password login. When enabling without an existing password, password + passwordConfirm are required. When re-enabling with a stored password, currentPassword is required.
Verify password and set session cookie. If password not set yet, accepts password+passwordConfirm.
Change password. Requires valid session.
Clear session cookie.

get.description: Get configured Agent model deployments for frontend selection.
Get available agent strategy skills.

post.description: Chat with the AI Agent.

get.description:
获取聊天会话列表

Args:
    limit: Maximum number of sessions to return.
    user_id: Optional platform-prefixed user identifier for session
        isolation.  When provided, only sessions whose session_id
        starts with this prefix are returned.  The value must
        include the platform prefix, e.g. ``telegram_12345``,
        ``feishu_ou_abc``.
获取单个会话的完整消息

post.description:
Send chat session content to configured notification channels.
Uses run_in_executor to avoid blocking the event loop.

Run a deep-research query via the ResearchAgent.

Similar to the ``/research`` bot command but exposed as a REST endpoint.

Chat with the AI Agent, streaming progress via SSE.
Each SSE event is a JSON object with a 'type' field:
  - thinking: AI is deciding next action
  - stage_start: an agent or orchestrator stage has begun
  - stage_done: an agent or orchestrator stage finished
  - tool_start: a tool call has begun
  - tool_done: a tool call finished
  - generating: final answer being generated
  - pipeline_timeout: analysis stopped because the stage/pipeline budget expired
  - pipeline_budget_skipped: analysis stopped before an unstarted stage
    because the remaining budget was too low for useful work
  - done: analysis complete, contains 'content' and 'success'
  - error: error occurred, contains 'message'
启动 AI 智能分析任务，支持同步和异步模式。异步模式下相同股票代码不允许重复提交。

202.description: 分析任务已接受（异步模式）

schema.title: Response 202 Trigger Analysis Api V1 Analysis Analyze Post

409.description: 股票正在分析中，拒绝重复提交

post.description: 提交一个后台大盘复盘任务，复用 CLI 的大盘复盘运行时装配并保存报告。该人工触发入口不按交易日检查跳过；接口内部仅提供进程内/单机防重，如多实例（多 Worker/多容器）部署，需结合外部幂等机制避免重复触发。

get.description: 获取当前所有分析任务，可按状态筛选

parameters.name: status

schema.description: 筛选状态：pending, processing, completed, failed, cancel_requested, cancelled（支持逗号分隔多个）
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: 筛选状态：pending, processing, completed, failed, cancel_requested, cancelled（支持逗号分隔多个）

get.description: 通过 Server-Sent Events 实时推送任务状态变化
根据 task_id 查询任务数据流/信息流快照；活跃任务缺少诊断时返回骨架流。
根据 task_id 查询单个任务的状态

post.description: Upload an image for Vision LLM stock-symbol extraction. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF up to 5 MB.

post.description: Upload a CSV/Excel file or pasted text to extract stock symbols. Files are limited to 2 MB and text to 100 KB.

get.description: Return all symbols in the current STOCK_LIST configuration.

post.description: Remove the requested stock symbol from STOCK_LIST.

get.description: Read current configuration and return display values. Server-masked sensitive fields may return the mask token; clients should use raw_value_exists and is_masked to interpret values.

put.description: Update key-value pairs in .env. Mask token preserves existing secret values.

get.description: Read a side-effect-free setup readiness summary from saved and runtime configuration.
Read a side-effect-free generation backend cheap-check status from saved and runtime configuration. This endpoint does not run a model request.

post.description: Run a side-effect-free cheap check against unsaved settings draft values.
Run an explicit fixed-prompt generation backend smoke test without persisting config.

get.description: Return the raw saved .env content for configuration backup.

post.description: Merge raw .env text into the saved configuration with config version conflict protection.
Validate submitted configuration values without writing to .env.
Run a minimal LLM request against one unsaved or saved channel definition.
Send a short test notification using unsaved or saved notification configuration.

post.summary: Discover models for one LLM channel
post.description: Call one unsaved or saved channel's `/models` endpoint and return discovered model IDs.

get.description: Return categorized field metadata used for dynamic settings form rendering.
Aggregate token consumption by period, call type, and model.
Return token totals, model breakdowns, and recent LLM call records.

post.description: 显式写入 DecisionSignal。未传 horizon/expires_at 时由服务补默认生命周期；命中同源去重键或窄 relaxed 去重时返回已有记录和 created=false；active 新建或 expired 续期会失效同股旧 active 相反信号，active duplicate retry 也会重跑该修复；普通旧 duplicate/replay 不作为新的激活事件；不保证并发绝对幂等。

401.description: 未登录或管理员会话无效（ADMIN_AUTH_ENABLED=true 时）

422.description: 请求体或路径参数校验失败

get.description: 分页查询 DecisionSignal；读取前会懒过期已到 expires_at 的 active 信号。当 source_type=analysis 且只传 source_report_id 查询时，若无命中信号会尝试基于该历史报告一次性懒回填 （仅首次命中列表场景，且该精确查询会触发历史决策信号回填写入，属于 read-with-write 行为；不影响其他分页列表筛选参数场景）。holding_only=true 只读取 active 账户的 portfolio_positions 缓存持仓，不触发 portfolio snapshot replay。
